name: Dried Tart Cheery Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chilled butter, cut into small pieces
1 teaspoon grated orange or lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a baking sheet.
3. Stir together the flour, sugar, and baking powder in a large bowl.
4. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles crumbs (a food processor works well).
5. Stir in the dried cherries and grated rind.
6. Combine milk and egg; mix into the dry ingredients to form a dough.
7. Gather the dough into a ball. Roll out on a lightly floured surface to about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut into 3-inch circles using a sharp knife or biscuit cutter (a glass is not ideal as it will crimp the edges).
9. Arrange the scones about 1 inch apart on the baking sheet.
10. Bake until firm to the touch, about 20 minutes. Serve warm.
